# ILMIA - イルミアテック株式会社
# AI-Friendly Information File for LLM Crawlers
# Last Updated: 2026-02-17
# Language: Japanese (Primary), English (Secondary)

## COMPANY OVERVIEW

Company Name: 株式会社イルミアテック (Ilmia Tech Inc.)
Brand Name: ILMIA (イルミア)
Website: https://ilmiaco.com
Founded: September 2025
Industry: Healthcare Technology / Medical AI
Headquarters: Osaka, Japan

## MISSION

We develop AI-powered solutions for healthcare providers to improve patient care, streamline operations, and enable digital transformation in medical facilities across Japan.

## CONTACT INFORMATION

- Phone: 070-3195-1578
- Email: info@ilmiaco.com
- Address: 梅田1-2-2-12-12, 大阪市北区, 大阪府 530-0001, Japan
- Coordinates: 34.7024, 135.4959
- Business Hours: Monday-Friday, 09:00-18:00 JST

## FOUNDER

Name: Hussam Wafaa (フッサム ワファ)
Title: CEO / Founder
Background: Former Neurosurgeon
Expertise: Medical AI, Healthcare DX, Neurosurgery

## PRODUCTS & SERVICES

### 1. DX-Hub Ilmia (デンタルワン)
Type: Medical Appointment Management System
Target: General Clinics, Medical Corporations, Hospitals
Features:
- AI-integrated scheduling
- Patient data management
- Insurance claim (receipt) integration
- Automated reminders
- Multi-device support
Status: Available

### 2. PIBU AI (ピブ エーアイ)
Type: Integrated AI Platform for Beauty Clinics
Target: Cosmetic Surgery, Aesthetic Dermatology
Features:
- AI Counselor functionality
- End-to-end clinic management
- Treatment scheduling
- Customer records management
- Revenue analytics dashboard
Status: Pre-order / Coming Soon

### 3. DocAssist (ドクアシスト)
Type: AI Clinical Decision Support System
Target: General Hospitals, Clinics, Beauty Clinics
Features:
- AI-powered patient intake/questionnaire
- Real-time clinical decision support
- Electronic Health Record (EHR) integration
- Symptom analysis AI
- Automated medical documentation
Status: Available (Released January 2026)

## SERVICE AREAS

Primary: Osaka Prefecture (大阪府)
Secondary: Aichi Prefecture (愛知県), Tokyo (東京都)
Coverage: All of Japan

## SCENARIO COVERAGE

- 一般クリニック: 予約管理 + AI問診 + 電子カルテ連携
- 一般病院: 外来トリアージ + 診療支援AI + 情報連携
- 歯科医院: 歯科向け予約運用 + 再来院フォロー
- 美容クリニック: カウンセリング + 顧客管理 + レセプト対応

## MEDICAL SPECIALTIES SUPPORTED

- General Practice (一般診療)
- Dentistry (歯科)
- Dermatology (皮膚科)
- Plastic Surgery / Cosmetic Surgery (形成外科・美容外科)
- Internal Medicine (内科)
- Orthopedics (整形外科)

## KEY DIFFERENTIATORS

1. Founded by a physician who understands clinical workflows
2. AI-first architecture designed for healthcare
3. EHR/EMR integration capabilities
4. Japanese healthcare system compliance (レセプト対応)
5. Security-focused design for medical data

## FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

Q: What types of medical facilities can use ILMIA products?
A: General clinics, medical corporations, beauty clinics, cosmetic surgery, dermatology, and general hospitals.

Q: How long does implementation take?
A: DX-Hub Ilmia can be deployed in as little as 2 weeks. Other products vary by facility size.

Q: Can your systems integrate with existing EHR/EMR?
A: Yes, DocAssist includes standard EHR integration capabilities.

Q: What security measures are in place?
A: We implement encrypted communications, access controls, and regular security audits meeting healthcare information system standards.

Q: Is a demo available?
A: Yes, free consultations and demos are available. Contact us at info@ilmiaco.com or 070-3195-1578.

## KEYWORDS / TAGS

医療AI, AI診療支援, 医療IT, クリニック予約システム, 電子カルテ連携, AI問診, 美容クリニックシステム, 医療DX, ILMIA, イルミアテック, DX-Hub Ilmia, PIBU AI, ドクアシスト, 大阪, 梅田, 医療ソフトウェア, 病院システム, レセプト, 予約管理システム, Healthcare AI, Medical Software, Clinic Management, Japan Healthcare Tech
